cedict_en: whole body/from head to toe/single person/a suit of clothes

must_distinguish.note: 全身 is neutral 'the whole body'; 浑身 (5k) adds emotional weight, often 'all over / soaked / aching'; 一身 emphasizes a state covering the person (一身汗 = covered in sweat), often in set phrases.
涨/上涨/涨价 = prices/levels surge (market connotation); 上升/升 = rise physically or in rank; 升高 = rise in measurable degree (temperature, level); 提高 = raise intentionally (quality, standard)

cedict_en: to come up/to approach/(verb complement indicating success)

must_distinguish.note: All involve movement toward the speaker. 进 = enter (neutral). 进来 = come in (into enclosed space, toward speaker). 上来 = come up (upward toward speaker). 传来 = reach the speaker (sound/news only, not physical). 回来 = come back (returning).
涨/上涨/涨价 = prices/levels surge (market connotation); 上升/升 = rise physically or in rank; 升高 = rise in measurable degree (temperature, level); 提高 = raise intentionally (quality, standard)
下边 = below/underneath (neutral spoken); 底下 = directly underneath (physical, colloquial); 下面 = below (also 'the following' in discourse); 以下 = below a threshold or 'hereafter' (formal written)

cedict_en: to decline/to drop/to fall/to go down/to decrease

must_distinguish.note: 下降 = drop/decline (measurable fall in quantity or level). 衰退 = decline/recession (gradual deterioration, economic or physical decay).
随后 = immediately following in sequence (right after); 不久 = an unspecified short time later (temporal gap, not necessarily immediate)
Both mean 'not only'. 不光 is colloquial spoken; 不但 is neutral/written. Both pair with 还/也/而且 in the second clause.

cedict_en: not very (clear, far away etc); not too/not often; infrequently

must_distinguish.note: Both mean 'not very', but 不大 also carries 'not often/rarely' (frequency sense); 不太 is neutral degree attenuation only
不对 = 'that's not right' (colloquial response, mild correction: 不对吧?); 错 = wrong/mistake (can be noun or adj., broader use: 你错了, 犯错).
错 = general wrong/mistake (adj+noun); 不对 = predicative spoken judgment ('that's not right'); 失误 = concrete performance slip (sports/work); 疏忽 = careless lapse due to inattention
不曾 stresses experiential negation (have never done); 未 is a literary/written particle meaning 'not yet' with no such experiential nuance.

不能不 = logical double negation 'cannot not do' (moral/logical compulsion, slightly emphatic); 不得不 = have no choice but (external circumstances force it); 不免 = unavoidably/can't help but (natural, emotionally toned); 势必 = bound to/inevitably (predicting an outcome, formal).

cedict_en: bad; harmful; unhealthy/(of a device, connection, material etc) defective; faulty

must_distinguish.note: 不良 = formal/written 'bad; harmful' (behavior, influence, records); 坏 = general colloquial 'bad; broken/spoiled'; 不良 never used for broken objects
两边 = both sides physically (spatial); 双方 = both parties (people or groups in an interaction or negotiation)
身高 = measured height (formal, e.g. medical records); 个子 = colloquial stature (general spoken); 个儿 = colloquial stature (northern/Beijing dialect variant)

cedict_en: to win a prize (in a lottery etc)
dataset_meanings: to win a prize (in a lottery etc)

must_distinguish.note: 中奖 = win by chance (lottery, lucky draw); 获奖 = receive a merit-based award/prize; 赢 = win (competition, game — broadest)

中奖 = win a lottery/prize draw (chance); 获奖 = receive a formal award/prize (achievement); 赢得 = win/gain something through effort (takes an object: trust, title); 赢 = simply win a contest/game; 胜 = beat an opponent (verb, also adj 'superior'); 胜利 = victory (noun, often military/political)

cedict_en: as (in the capacity of)/to take sth as/to act as/to serve as/to behave as/to become/to be/to do/by (in the passive voice)/because of/for/to/variant of 為|为[wei2]/variant of 為|为[wei4]

must_distinguish.note: 为 = be/act as (literary/formal copula or role); 成为 = become (take on a new status/role, lasting change); 充当 = serve as / fill the role of (temporary, functional); 变成 = turn into (physical/qualitative transformation).

cedict_en: to rely mainly on/to attach most importance to
to raise a hand/to put up one's hand (as signal)
dataset_meanings: to put up one's hand (as signal)

must_distinguish.note: 举手 = raise one's hand (specific gesture, e.g. voting or asking); 抬头 = raise one's head (look up); 举 = lift/raise in general or cite an example (broader base verb)
之下 = under/beneath (abstract hierarchy: rule, pressure, conditions); 地下 = underground (physical location, also fig. clandestine)
之内 = within a limit/boundary (written); 以内 = within/not exceeding (often quantitative: 一周以内); 之中 (5k) = amid/within a set or space (书中之中 — more literary, spatial or figurative).
乘客 = passenger (the rider); 乘务员 = cabin/train attendant (crew serving passengers)

cedict_en: to ride (in a car or carriage)/to drive/to motor
dataset_meanings: to ride (in a car or carriage)

must_distinguish.note: 骑车 = ride a bicycle/motorbike (straddle-type); 乘车 = travel by car/vehicle (passenger); 乘/乘坐 = ride/travel by (formal; 乘 also means multiply); 搭 = hitch a ride or take public transport (colloquial)
乡村 = countryside/rural area (pastoral, cultural concept); 村 = a specific village (settlement); 农村 = rural/farming area (administrative or economic framing)

cedict_en: in fact/in reality/actually/as a matter of fact/de facto/ipso facto

must_distinguish.note: 事实上 stresses known facts ('the fact is...'); 实际上 stresses practical/real-world reality; 其实 is conversational and corrects an assumption ('actually...')

cedict_en: to give; to deliver; to hand over
dataset_meanings: to give; to deliver; to hand over

must_distinguish.note: 递给 = pass to (physical hand-to-hand, no ownership transfer); 交给 = hand over (transfer responsibility, duty, or ownership)

cedict_en: traffic police (abbr. for 交通警察[jiao1 tong1 jing3 cha2])

must_distinguish.note: 交警 = traffic police specifically; 警察 = police / police officer (general term); 警方 = the police as an institution / police side (used in news)
付 = pay/hand over (general); 付款 = make a payment (transaction); 交费 = pay a fee to an institution; 缴纳 = pay obligatory dues/taxes (formal)
好友 = close personal friend (emotional intimacy, non-family); 亲人 = close relatives/loved ones (family bond); 伙伴 = companion/partner (cooperative relationship, not necessarily intimate)
All mean 'close/intimate'. 亲密 = emotional intimacy between people; 密切 = close (of formal relations, connections, cooperation — not personal warmth); 亲热 = warm and affectionate in manner/behavior.
人力 = human manpower/capacity (resource planning); 人工 = manual/human-operated (as adj: artificial; or noun: manual labor cost); 劳动 = labor as physical toil (ideological/economic sense)

All restrict scope to 'merely/only': 仅/仅仅 are neutral restrictors; 只不过 and 只是 add a mild dismissive/concessive shade; 无非 = 'nothing but' (slightly emphatic); 不过 doubles as a concessive connector ('however')
今后 = from now on (time adverb, forward-looking); 未来 = the future (general noun/adj); 前途 = personal prospects/career future (evaluative, about a person's potential)
从中 = from within a situation (source of action: 从中学习); 其中 = among them (anaphoric reference to a set); 当中 = in the middle/among (spatial or centered focus).
其中 = among them / from them (anaphoric reference, pointing back); 从中 = from within that / therefrom (extracting benefit or information from a situation)

cedict_en: to pay; to expend; to invest (energy or time)
dataset_meanings: to pay; to expend; to invest (energy or time)

must_distinguish.note: 使劲 = exert physical force or effort (push hard in the moment). 付出 = expend/invest (effort, time, emotion — abstract commitment over time).

付出 = expend/invest (effort, money, emotion — what you give); 使劲/使劲儿 = exert force (physical effort, push hard; 儿 is spoken Beijing variant); 拼命 = with all one's might (desperate, intense manner adverb); 全力以赴 = go all out (idiom, total commitment)

cedict_en: to be a substitute for; to act on behalf of; to replace; to substitute/generation; dynasty; age; period; (historical) era; (geological) eon
dataset_meanings: to act on behalf of others

must_distinguish.note: 更换 = swap out (formal, objects); 替 = do something in place of someone; 替代 = substitute (abstract/systemic); 代替 = replace/act for (general); 换 = exchange or switch; 代 = act for + era/generation (multi-sense morpheme)
之内 = within a limit/boundary (written); 以内 = within/not exceeding (often quantitative: 一周以内); 之中 (5k) = amid/within a set or space (书中之中 — more literary, spatial or figurative).

cedict_en: apart from/other than/except for/external/outside of/on the other side of/beyond

must_distinguish.note: 以外 = 'besides; outside of' (common in speech and writing after noun phrases); 之外 = same meaning but more formal/written register

cedict_en: (literary) messenger; servant/price/value/(chemistry) valence/particle used between an adverb and a verb or adjective/(dialect) particle used after a negative adverb such as 不[bu4] or 別|别[bie2] without any other following element

must_distinguish.note: 价钱 = spoken/retail price (colloquial); 价 = bound morpheme in compounds (不等价, 价值); 价格 = formal market/listed price
价钱 = price (everyday spoken transaction); 价格 = price (market/listed, formal); 代价 = cost/price (figurative sacrifice); 成本 = production/unit cost (business)
价钱 = spoken/retail price (colloquial); 价 = bound morpheme in compounds (不等价, 价值); 价格 = formal market/listed price

cedict_en: to go on vacation; to have a holiday; to take leave
dataset_meanings: to go on vacation; to have a holiday; to take leave

must_distinguish.note: 暑假 = summer vacation (fixed school/academic holiday); 休假 = taking personal leave or a holiday (worker context, voluntary, any time of year).
一流 = top-ranked, first-rate (comparative rank: 一流大学); 优良 = excellent in quality/character (traits, breeds, traditions — not a rank comparison).

cedict_en: meals (abbr. for 伙食[huo3 shi2])/variant of 夥|伙[huo3]/companion/partner/group/classifier for groups of people/to combine/together

must_distinguish.note: 群体 = sociological group/community (formal, written); 伙 = colloquial bunch/gang or partner (informal); 团 = a lump/group (also classifier for lumps/troops)
伙 = colloquial group or gang-mate (informal, can be pejorative); 伙伴 = companion/partner (social, friendship); 伴侣 = romantic/life partner (intimate relationship)
会员 = paid/club member (subscription or dues-based); 成员 = member of any group or team (neutral); 委员 = committee member (official role)

会晤 = formal diplomatic meeting (heads of state, official); 会谈 = formal talks (political or high-level, may involve multiple sessions); 洽谈 = negotiate/discuss for business purposes (commercial register).

cedict_en: (of a sound) to come through/to be heard/(of news) to arrive

must_distinguish.note: All involve movement toward the speaker. 进 = enter (neutral). 进来 = come in (into enclosed space, toward speaker). 上来 = come up (upward toward speaker). 传来 = reach the speaker (sound/news only, not physical). 回来 = come back (returning).
房屋 is formal 'building/house'; 屋 is literary/short for room or house; 屋子 is colloquial 'room'; 住房 emphasises residential function/housing as a social concept; 公寓 specifically means apartment building
体力 = physical stamina/endurance; 力气 = brute physical effort (colloquial); 力量 = strength/force (abstract or collective); 有力 = forceful/powerful (attributive adjective)
使劲 and 使劲儿 are near-identical in meaning (exert force/effort); 使劲儿 is the Beijing erhua colloquial form. Learners may treat them as different words — they are stylistic variants.
使劲 = exert physical force or effort (push hard in the moment). 付出 = expend/invest (effort, time, emotion — abstract commitment over time).

付出 = expend/invest (effort, money, emotion — what you give); 使劲/使劲儿 = exert force (physical effort, push hard; 儿 is spoken Beijing variant); 拼命 = with all one's might (desperate, intense manner adverb); 全力以赴 = go all out (idiom, total commitment)
例子 = a general illustrative instance or example; 案例 = a documented case study or legal precedent; 榜样 = a role model, a positive example to emulate
例子 = neutral instance/example; 案例 = case/precedent (legal or analytical); 典型 = classic/representative example; 榜样 = role model to emulate.
依照 = according to a standard/procedure (formal); 按照 = according to a rule/plan (neutral); 据 = according to a source/information (can introduce evidence)
促销 = promote sales via discounts/campaigns (commercial); 推广 = popularize/roll out broadly (policy, methods, technology — not necessarily commercial)

cedict_en: contrary to what one might expect/actually/contrariwise/why don't you
dataset_meanings: contrary to what one might expect

must_distinguish.note: 倒是 softens or concedes with mild contrast; 反倒 stresses an unexpected reversal (colloquial); 相反 is a neutral adjective/connector meaning 'opposite'

做到 = 'manage to do / succeed in doing' (emphasis on effort overcoming difficulty); 完成 = 'complete / finish' (a task or assignment reaches its end); 实现 = 'realize / bring into being' (a goal, dream, or plan); 取得 = 'obtain / achieve' (results, qualifications, a concrete gain).

cedict_en: to dream; to have a dream; (fig.) to indulge in wishful thinking

must_distinguish.note: 做梦 = have a dream (while sleeping) or daydream (general). 梦见 = dream of sth specific (see it in a dream). 梦想 = cherished aspiration, to dream of (waking goal). 幻想 = fantasy/daydream (unrealistic imagination).
停 = general stop/park; 停下 = abrupt stop of movement/action (spoken); 停止 = cease (formal, ongoing action); 暂停 = temporary pause (resumes later); 停顿 = brief pause mid-flow (speech, music)

cedict_en: to stay somewhere temporarily/to stop over

must_distinguish.note: 停留 = stop over at a place (movement context); 待 = idle stay, hang around (colloquial); 留 = remain/keep (general, incl. leaving sth behind); 留下 = stay on OR leave sth behind (resultative)

meaning_en: to park; to stop a car
cedict_en: to pull up (stop one's vehicle)/to park/(of a machine) to stop working/to stall
